content:
## OpenCode Server APIs Detalhadas

### LSP
- GET /lsp → LSPStatus[] (status do servidor LSP)
- GET /formatter → FormatterStatus[] (status do formatador)

### MCP
- GET /mcp → { [name: string]: MCPStatus } (status do servidor MCP)
- POST /mcp → Adicionar servidor MCP dinamicamente (body: { name, config })

### Agents
- GET /agent → Agent[] (listar todos os agentes disponíveis)

### Sessions
- CRUD completo: GET/POST/DELETE/PATCH /session, GET /session/:id/children
- /session/:id/init → Analisar app e criar AGENTS.md
- /session/:id/fork → Fork de sessão em mensagem específica
- /session/:id/abort, /session/:id/share, /session/:id/summarize
- /session/:id/revert, /session/:id/unrevert
- /session/:id/diff → obter diff da sessão
- /session/:id/permissions/:permissionID → responder permissão

### Messages
- GET /session/:id/message → listar mensagens
- POST /session/:id/message → enviar e aguardar resposta
- POST /session/:id/prompt_async → mensagem assíncrona (204 No Content)
- POST /session/:id/command → executar comando de barra
- POST /session/:id/shell → executar comando shell

### Provider
- GET /provider → listar provedores
- GET /provider/auth → métodos de autenticação
- POST /provider/:id/oauth/authorize → autorizar OAuth
- POST /provider/:id/oauth/callback → callback OAuth

### Tools (Experimental)
- GET /experimental/tool/ids → listar IDs de ferramentas
- GET /experimental/tool?provider=&model= → esquemas JSON

### TUI Control
- POST /tui/append-prompt, open-help, open-sessions, open-themes, open-models
- POST /tui/submit-prompt, clear-prompt, execute-command, show-toast
- GET /tui/control/next, POST /tui/control/response (controle bidirecional)
tag: opencode, server, lsp, mcp, agents, api
